name: Cosmise Streamboards
description: Watch an agent build, verify, and present organisation-scoped Streamboards reports.

environment.name: COSMISE_MCP_URL
environment.description: Production Cosmise MCP endpoint used by the private backend wrapper.

environment.name: COSMISE_REPORT_SYNC_MS
environment.description: Background report metadata synchronization interval in milliseconds.

secrets.name: COSMISE_MCP_TOKEN
secrets.description: Organization-scoped Cosmise MCP credential available only to the app backend. SYM-Node may materialize it directly or the backend imports the same key from the owning profile's private managed environment.

integrations.reason: Supply the organization-scoped credential to the private app backend so its single wrapped MCP can synchronize reports and instrument every Streamboards tool call.

permissions.reason: Render approved Cosmise Streamboard URLs supplied by the agent.
